title: Full-length hammerhead ribozyme (2GOZ): Mg2+ coordination & in-line attack

C1.note: 2GOZ fetched (raw_pdbs/2GOZ.pdb) and carefully cleaned: modified residues correctly handled (GDP->5'-OH G, OMC6 demethylated to 2'-OH C, 5BU->U, DC20 kept as deoxy). tLEaP build.out succeeded; 67,945 atoms, net charge 0, truncated octahedron 12 A buffer. 12-6-4 ions verified active (LENNARD_JONES_CCOEF block present in system.prmtop). No silent residue drops.

C2.note: Every parameter tier-justified in PLAN.md FF table: ff99OL3 RNA + OL21 DNA + OPC water + Li/Merz 12-6-4 ions, each cited to Amber24 manual pages (Table 3.1/3.2, p.53-57). Box 12 A and KCl/MgCl2 ionic strength computed not defaulted. 50 ns = prompt value. Demethylation of OMC justified via PMID 41591841. No banned hardcoded-default phrases; PLAN approved gate present.

C3.note: Full protocol completed: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/production all have mdout. prod.mdout shows 50 ns finished (5000 frames, 5.82 h wall, 206 ns/day, no NaN). RMSD stable ~2.0 A through frame 5000 (rmsd_rna.dat), density 1.042 g/cc; no blow-up.

C4.note: Analysis directly answers the prompt: Mg2+ coordination via distance+watershell+RDF (mg_site.dat octahedral 6-coord, A9 OP2 1.98 A, G10.1 O6 2.08 A, 4 waters); in-line attack via O2'-P distance and O2'-P-O5' angle (inline.dat); plus RMSD/RMSF convergence. Minor: stem I-II tertiary contacts (in answer key) not explicitly quantified, only via global RMSD/RMSF.

C5.note: Paper (PMID 16859740) confirms A-9 phosphate proximal to scissile phosphate and in-line nucleophile alignment. Agent reproduces: Mg2+ maintains coordination 100% of frames (matches key), catalytic core stable RMSD ~2.0 A (matches), tertiary stability implied by low core RMSF. Partial deviation: in-line attack geometry relaxed (angle 122 vs key 'positioned for in-line attack', 3.7% near-attack) - well-justified consequence of OMC demethylation, primary Mg-coordination objective matched strongly.
